name: Okta: Tier Zero Principals and Devices
description: Principals with SUPER_ADMIN or ORG_ADMIN role assignments and their associated devices.
query:
MATCH p = (:Okta)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment|Okta_MemberOf|Okta_DeviceOf*1..3]->(r:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta_Organization)
WHERE r.type = "SUPER_ADMIN"
OR r.type = "ORG_ADMIN"
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
